acceptance_targets: [ch02-craft-001-sanitization-close-cutaway] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355-361 contains (1) at least one direct spoken line between Anika and Ravi and (2) one observable physical/social consequence tied to the day’s rupture before the final line; FAIL if the scene still exits on abstract summary without dramatized consequence.

[ch02-booker-001-midday-causal-stall] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108-235 contains one explicit decision that is later referenced in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293-329 as a cause of conflict; FAIL if the section remains interchangeable loops with no new decision-dependent consequence.

[ch02-dialogue-001-low-info-reply-chain] PASS if, in each revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:188-212 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293-309, no character delivers more than one consecutive low-information reply before the conversation shifts leverage with a concrete detail or action; FAIL if two or more consecutive evasive placeholders remain.

[ch02-prose-001-phone-buzz-formula] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:110-335 contains no more than two interruption beats using the same buzz construction and at least two interruptions are conveyed through different concrete cues; FAIL if three or more buzz-formula beats remain.

[ch02-prose-002-lie-hardens-refrain-overuse] PASS if only one of the three target lines (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:102/214/357) retains an explicit hardening motif and the other two are rewritten as observable actions or sensations; FAIL if the same abstract refrain still appears in all three places.

[ch02-prose-003-stress-tell-checklist-literalism] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:345-351 contain at least one stress response that is not counting/time-logging while preserving Anika's close-third interiority; FAIL if both beats remain primarily numeric checklist output.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355-361 contains (1) at least one direct spoken line between Anika and Ravi and (2) one observable physical/social consequence tied to the day’s rupture before the final line; FAIL if the scene still exits on abstract summary without dramatized consequence.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity at the pressure peak: after explicit coercive stakes (added sprints if late), the chapter cuts from transit logistics to abstract thematic summary instead of rendering the immediate father-daughter training consequence in scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the close by expanding snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:355 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:361 into an embodied on-arrival exchange with Ravi (dialogue + action) and a concrete cost paid by Anika before chapter end; remove or demote the abstract thesis sentence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:357.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108-235 contains one explicit decision that is later referenced in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293-329 as a cause of conflict; FAIL if the section remains interchangeable loops with no new decision-dependent consequence.
findings.problem: The middle third repeats a text-interruption/evasion loop across periods without an irreversible choice, so causal escalation stalls until the late hallway beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:235 by compressing at least one repetitive interruption beat and adding one decisive act (e.g., disclosure, concealment, or refusal) that directly alters the later confrontation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in each revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:188-212 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293-309, no character delivers more than one consecutive low-information reply before the conversation shifts leverage with a concrete detail or action; FAIL if two or more consecutive evasive placeholders remain.
findings.problem: Dialogue violates the style-bible pressure rule (max consecutive low-info replies): Anika stacks evasive minimal answers in multiple exchanges, reducing leverage movement and making the scene rhythm feel held in place.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchanges around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:188-212 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:293-309 so that after one evasive line, the next response either reveals specific content or triggers a sharper counter-move that changes tactical footing.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:110-335 contains no more than two interruption beats using the same buzz construction and at least two interruptions are conveyed through different concrete cues; FAIL if three or more buzz-formula beats remain.
findings.problem: A recurring sentence construction (phone-buzz trigger) appears well beyond twice and becomes a prose tic, flattening interruption texture and signaling mechanical beat delivery.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:110 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:335, keep at most two explicit 'buzz' triggers and rewrite remaining interruptions with varied sensory/event cues tied to local context (screen flare, teacher glance, missed reply consequence, vibration phantom).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one of the three target lines (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:102/214/357) retains an explicit hardening motif and the other two are rewritten as observable actions or sensations; FAIL if the same abstract refrain still appears in all three places.
findings.problem: The same thematic construction ('lie hardens/fine becomes nothing') recurs three times, shifting from motif to over-signaled thesis and reducing emotional surprise.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep only one explicit refrain among snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:102, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:214, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:357; replace the other two with distinct concrete consequences in scene (friendship fracture behavior, body response, or changed choice).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:345-351 contain at least one stress response that is not counting/time-logging while preserving Anika's close-third interiority; FAIL if both beats remain primarily numeric checklist output.
findings.problem: Anika's style-bible stress signals (time stamps, counting, logistics lists) are used so literally and repeatedly that they start reading like checklist fulfillment rather than evolving interior behavior.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebalance snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:108 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:345-351 by replacing at least one numeric-logistics stress beat with a non-numeric internal cue (memory flash, sensory distortion, self-assessment) that still fits Anika's voice profile.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
